description: Perform batch intensity normalization on 5 fluorescence microscopy images (files containing '_w2.TIF') from the BBBC005 dataset located in '~/Fiji_Data/raw/BBBC005/'. Normalize the intensity distribution of each image to a Target Mean of 100 and a Target Standard Deviation of 40, ensuring values are clipped to the 8-bit range (0-255). Save the normalized 8-bit TIFF images to '~/Fiji_Data/results/normalization/' with filenames 'normalized_A01.tif', 'normalized_A02.tif', etc., corresponding to the input order. Create a report at '~/Fiji_Data/results/normalization/normalization_report.csv' including columns for filename, original_mean, original_stddev, normalized_mean, and normalized_stddev. Additionally, save a histogram comparison image to '~/Fiji_Data/results/normalization/histogram_comparison.png'.
